stretch_live_verification.title: BA / People Analytics
stretch_live_verification.outcome: URL is a bare search page, no concrete posting.

conclusion: Thin market tonight. 0 clean eligible auto-submits after live verification. Most PASSes were genuine H1B hard-fails (zero non-tech filings) or dead/expired postings. Reported honestly per discovery doctrine — did NOT pad or force applications to dead/ineligible roles.
lessons: Add a CLEARANCE/citizenship check to discovery eval (Guidehouse-type gov-consulting roles often require clearance = H1B disqualifier).

Verify postings live in the authenticated browser before counting them — many web-search hits were already dead (Mercury, Coursera, Grafana, New Relic, Providence, Forth, Depave postings all expired/404).
Big4/MBB 'entry level' category landing pages are NOT live reqs — must find the specific open Associate/Analyst requisition.
